summary: Frontend-only testing of Insight Networks static marketing site completed. All 12 requested features verified working. Tested home hero, navigation across 5 pages, services (6 cards), plans (3 cards with POPULAR badge and 'Contact for Pricing'), feature comparison matrix, about, contact form (mocked) with success toast, info cards (tel:/mailto:/web links), footer, mobile hamburger menu, CTAs routing to /contact, and hero secondary CTA routing to /plans. All data-testid attributes present.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Services page card testid uses `services-detail-{title}` prefix while Home page uses `service-card-{title}`. Both work but inconsistent naming. Consider standardising prefix for clarity (not blocking).
Minor: Plans card pattern duplicated between Home.jsx and Plans.jsx (~50 lines). Could be extracted into a shared PlanCard component (DRY).
Service '24/7 Support' testid contains a `/` (services-detail-24/7-support) — works but `/` in testids can be awkward for some test runners. Consider sanitising to `24-7-support`.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (33/33 functional checks passed; 2 initial assertion mismatches were due to test selectors, re-verified with correct selectors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing site, no backend. Contact form submit is intentionally MOCKED (setTimeout + sonner toast). Services page uses data-testid `services-detail-{name}` (NOT `service-card-{name}`). Home preview cards use `service-card-{name}`. All 5 routes (/, /services, /plans, /about, /contact) work via React Router v7. Mobile menu toggles via `[data-testid=mobile-menu-toggle]` opens `[data-testid=mobile-menu]`. Form resets after success toast.

tested_features.home_hero_text: PASS - 'Smart Networks. Stronger Business. Better Tomorrow.' present
tested_features.services_6_cards: PASS - 6 services-detail-* cards (Internet Leased Line, Fiber, Network, Security, Cloud, 24/7)
tested_features.contact_for_pricing: PASS - shown on all 3 plan cards
tested_features.feature_comparison_table: PASS - matrix renders with Unlimited Data, Priority Support, Static IP rows
tested_features.contact_form_submit: PASS - shows 'Thanks! Our team will reach out within 24 hours.' toast, form resets
tested_features.contact_info_cards_links: PASS - tel:+91..., mailto:contact@..., https://... all correct
tested_features.footer: PASS - renders with contact info (phone, email, Bhopal address)
tested_features.ctas_route_to_contact: PASS - hero-primary, navbar, plan CTAs all route to /contact
tested_features.data_testid_coverage: PASS - all interactive elements have data-testid
